topic: kick_bench.hexa:479 witness counter false-PASS fix — pre-existing witness files from prior runs falsely incremented witnesses_landed even on rc!=0, masking all-FAIL backends as orchestrator PASS. Self-reported in 2026-04-26 fanout #6 (bench-orchestrator-smoke).

core_5_op_kernel.1_intake_topic: kick_bench.hexa:479 increments witnesses_landed when witness_path exists on disk, regardless of (a) whether rc==0 (status=fire) and (b) whether the witness was emitted within this iteration's t0..t1 window. Pre-existing witnesses from prior runs of the same topic-slug satisfy the guard, producing false PASS sentinels even when both backends actually failed.

2_pre_register_falsifiers.name: freshness-helper-correct
2_pre_register_falsifiers.criterion: _file_mtime_s returns ≥now-tolerance for fresh file, ≪now for ancient file (touched -t 200001010000), 0 for absent file
2_pre_register_falsifiers.method: isolation hexa snippet — touch /tmp/mt_fresh, touch -t 200001010000 /tmp/mt_stale, assert mtime cmp

2_pre_register_falsifiers.name: guard-rejects-fail-status
2_pre_register_falsifiers.criterion: when status=fail (rc!=0), witnesses_landed is NOT incremented even if witness_path exists and is fresh
2_pre_register_falsifiers.method: logic trace: branches at line 492-496 require status==fire as first conjunct

2_pre_register_falsifiers.name: guard-rejects-stale-witness-on-fire
2_pre_register_falsifiers.criterion: when status=fire but witness mtime < t0_s, status is reassigned to 'fail-stale-witness' and witnesses_landed is NOT incremented
2_pre_register_falsifiers.method: logic trace: else-if branch at line 494-496 catches stale-on-fire case explicitly

2_pre_register_falsifiers.name: no-regression-dry-run
2_pre_register_falsifiers.criterion: hexa run tool/kick_bench.hexa <topic> --dry-run still emits __KICK_BENCH__ PASS witnesses=0 sentinel without parse error

2_pre_register_falsifiers.name: no-regression-usage-fail
2_pre_register_falsifiers.criterion: hexa run tool/kick_bench.hexa with no topic still emits __KICK_BENCH__ FAIL backends=0 witnesses=0 + reason= line

3_fan_out_axes.rationale: The counter MUST reflect what THIS bench iteration produced, not what exists on disk. Any path where a counter answer paint-overs an underlying FAIL is a raw#80 sentinel honesty violation. Fix moves the increment behind a 3-condition guard: status==fire AND non-empty witness path AND mtime∈[t0_s..now].

mtime-based freshness check via stat -f %m (BSD/macOS) || stat -c %Y (GNU/Linux) gives portable seconds-resolution time. Compared against floor(t0/1000) — same-second edge cases accepted via >=. New stale-on-fire path emits status='fail-stale-witness' so the bench log preserves diagnostic visibility instead of silently dropping the iteration.

4_tier_1_promotion_gate_via_falsifier_pa.promotion_criterion: F1 PASS (helper correct) + F2 PASS (rc!=0 rejected) + F3 PASS (stale-on-fire reassigned) + F4 PASS (dry-run regression 0) + F5 PASS (usage-fail regression 0)
4_tier_1_promotion_gate_via_falsifier_pa.result: F1 PASS observed; F2/F3 verified by logic trace; F4 PASS observed; F5 PASS observed

root_cause.trigger_input: two backends both fail (rc!=0). Their kick_dispatch outputs still contain `__KICK_RESULT__ ... witness=<path>` lines pointing at the topic's design/kick/ directory where prior-run witnesses already exist on disk.
root_cause.why_false_PASS: guard tests file existence, not freshness or rc==0. Both backends parse a witness path; both files exist (from prior runs); counter=2; len(backends)=2; line 495 condition `witnesses_landed < len(backends)` is false; falls through to `__KICK_BENCH__ PASS backends=2 witnesses=2`.

fix_summary.primary_change: Added _file_mtime_s(path)->i64 helper using stat -f %m (BSD) || stat -c %Y (GNU) returning integer seconds (0 if absent). At the increment site (now lines 488-496), introduced a 3-condition guard: rc==0 (status=='fire') AND witness_path non-empty AND mtime_s >= floor(t0/1000). Stale-on-fire case (status=fire but witness predates t0) reassigns status to 'fail-stale-witness' so the bench log preserves the diagnostic.

files_touched.change: +_file_mtime_s helper (~6 LOC at L24-30) + 3-condition freshness guard at L485-496 replacing single-line existence check

tier_1_promotions.rationale: Counter increments now require status==fire AND fresh-witness-mtime within iteration window. Pre-existing on-disk witnesses can no longer paint-over an all-FAIL bench run as PASS. Pattern reusable: any orchestrator counter that aggregates per-iteration outcomes should require freshness + status, not just file existence.
tier_1_promotions.evidence: tool/kick_bench.hexa:485-496 — 3-condition guard with explicit stale-on-fire reassignment; isolation test confirms _file_mtime_s rejects 1999-12-31-touched file and accepts now-touched file.

falsifier_outcomes.evidence: isolation /tmp test → fresh_mt=1777243433 fresh_ok=Y, stale_mt=946652400 stale_rejects=Y, absent_mt=0 absent_zero=Y
logic trace: guard at L492 `if status == "fire" && fresh` short-circuits on status=='fail'; no else branch increments witnesses_landed
logic trace: guard at L494 `else if status == "fire" && witness_path.len() > 0 && !fresh` reassigns status to 'fail-stale-witness'; no increment in this branch
hexa run tool/kick_bench.hexa test-witness-counter-fix-smoke --dry-run → 3 __KICK_BENCH_DRY__ records emitted + __KICK_BENCH__ PASS backends=3 witnesses=0 sentinel
hexa run tool/kick_bench.hexa --dry-run (no topic) → __KICK_BENCH__ FAIL backends=0 witnesses=0 + reason=missing-topic fix=... raw 66 trailer

honesty_preservation: no FAIL/NEAR/OBSTRUCTION/CONDITIONAL paint-over; the prior fanout #6 OBSTRUCTION_DOCUMENTED status remains unchanged in its original record. This fix addresses the bonus self-reported counter bug from #6 only.
